title: Add support for `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Rm.AllowWildcard`
body:
Tracks the `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Rm.AllowWildcard` item from #6732.

- [ ] Add `AllowWildcard` to `copier.RemoveOptions` (type: `bool`) // glob for items to remove, default false
- [ ] Add unit test to the copier package
